title: centaurium verticillatum
intro: Centaurium verticillatum, also known as white centaury, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family, native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Centaurium verticillatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, while also supporting the digestive system and immune system. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is also found in some herbal teas and supplements, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment have not been extensively scientifically studied.
